name: pixelmatch

en.when_to_use: Use it when you already have RGBA ImageData for two same-size images from canvas (two renders/screenshots) and need an extremely fast pixel-level comparison with a highlighted diff buffer. If you want to pass image files/URLs directly and receive analysis metadata such as difference percentage and bounding boxes, use the more turnkey resemblejs.
en.why_valuable: Pixel-by-pixel image diff with anti-alias detection is the core primitive of visual regression; native AI cannot compare pixel differences between two images, count mismatches, or generate a highlighted difference image.

data_in.note: img1/img2 must have the same width x height and be RGBA arrays of length width*height*4 (canvas: ctx.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data). This is not JSON and is obtained from canvas by the consuming AI; pass an equal-length output buffer to receive the diff image.

schema.img1: Uint8Array | Uint8ClampedArray -- RGBA pixels for image A
schema.img2: Uint8Array | Uint8ClampedArray -- RGBA pixels for image B (must have the same dimensions)
schema.threshold?: number -- matching threshold 0..1; smaller is more sensitive; default 0.1
schema.includeAA?: boolean -- disable anti-alias detection (count AA as differences); default false
schema.diffMask?: boolean -- use a transparent background (mask) for the diff image; default false

when_to_use: 已从 canvas 拿到两张同尺寸图的 RGBA ImageData(两次渲染/截图),要极快算像素级差异并输出高亮 diff 缓冲时用它。若想直接喂图片文件/URL 并拿差异百分比、包围盒等分析元数据,用更 turnkey 的 resemblejs。
why_valuable: 逐像素图像 diff(带抗锯齿识别)是 visual-regression 的核心原语;原生 AI 无法比较两张图的像素差异、算 mismatch 计数、生成高亮差异图。

data_in.note: img1/img2 必须同 width×height,长度 = width*height*4 的 RGBA 数组(canvas: ctx.getImageData(0,0,w,h).data)。非 JSON,由消费 AI 从 canvas 取;output 传一个等长缓冲以接收 diff 图。

schema.img1: Uint8Array | Uint8ClampedArray —— 图 A 的 RGBA 像素
schema.img2: Uint8Array | Uint8ClampedArray —— 图 B 的 RGBA 像素(须同尺寸)
schema.threshold?: number —— 匹配阈值 0..1,越小越敏感,默认 0.1
schema.includeAA?: boolean —— 关闭抗锯齿识别(把 AA 也算差异),默认 false
schema.diffMask?: boolean —— 差异图用透明底(mask),默认 false

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;纯 JS 计算层。
provides.outputs: 同步返回不匹配像素数(number);若传入 output 缓冲,则写入可 putImageData 回 canvas 的差异高亮图。

api_surface.compare: pixelmatch(img1, img2, output, width, height, options?) => number

peer.note: 本条吃底层 RGBA 缓冲、要自己从 canvas 取 ImageData;要 turnkey 直接喂图片文件/URL 并拿 misMatchPercentage/包围盒用 resemblejs。

boot.note: img1/img2 长度必须都等于 width*height*4 且同尺寸,否则抛错;函数同步返回。v7 为原生 ESM;node 侧 'pngjs' 依赖仅 CLI 用,浏览器导出函数不需要。

isolation.evidence: +esm default export 为函数(grep: 'N as default');签名 pixelmatch(img1: Uint8Array|Uint8ClampedArray, img2, output: Uint8Array|Uint8ClampedArray|void, width: number, height: number, options?) => number 逐字取自 index.d.ts,options threshold(0.1)/includeAA/alpha/aaColor/diffColor/diffColorAlt/diffMask/checkerboard(true) 均真实。纯数值原语:无 DOM、无样式、无事件、无 shadow 议题(headless-primitive)。v7 原生 ESM(package type:module);node-only 'pngjs' 依赖由 CLI 使用,非导出函数依赖。img1/img2 须同为 width*height*4 长度。
